reviews.name: 미****
reviews.content:
바닥도 튼튼하고 구성이 전체적으로 튼튼해요. 그래서 접혀져있을 때  생각보다 무게가 좀 있다 느낄 수도 있는데 그게 오히려 좋더라구요. 바닥이 튼튼해야 되니까요!! 기내용으로도 괜찮을 것 같아요. 차에다 두고 급할 때 사용하려고 구매했어요. 가방이 여러개인데 이건 혁신템이에요!! 
체장 30cm 4.8kg 미니비숑 라지 사이즈 좋아요. 매쉬망 안에 편히 있을 수 있는 크기에요. 
블랙도 하나 더 살까봐요~~.
reviews.content_en:
The bottom is sturdy and the overall construction feels really solid. So when it's folded, you might feel like it's heavier than expected, but honestly that's actually a good thing. The bottom needs to be sturdy anyway!! I think it would work fine for air travel too. I bought it to keep in my car for emergencies. I have several bags, but this one is a game-changer!! 

My mini bichon is 30cm long and 4.8kg, and the large size is perfect for her. She can stay comfortably inside the mesh. I'm thinking about getting another one in black too~~.

reviews.name: 안****
reviews.content:
저는 강아지 가방 중독자입니다!!! ㅋㅋㅋ ㅠㅠ
집에 가방은 많은데 접을수있는 가방은 처음이에요!
배송도 하루만에 와서 진짜 너무 좋았어요
강아지가 5키로여서 가방이 무거우면 너무 힘들어서 가방무게를 가장 중요시하는데 진짜 그냥 장바구니 무게에요!!! 색상도 너무 이쁘고 강아지가 너무 퍈하게 있어서 정말 만족스럽습니다!! 우리집 멈머 덕분에 누나는 파산직전입니다 그럼 이만🥲 앗 그리고 바닥 안무너져서 정말조아요 강추~!~!
reviews.content_en:
I'm obsessed with dog carriers!!! ㅋㅋㅋ ㅠㅠ
I have lots of bags at home, but this is my first collapsible one!
The shipping came in just one day and it was seriously so good 😭
My dog weighs 5kg, so if the bag is heavy it's really tough, so weight is my top priority—and it's literally just the weight of a shopping bag!!! The color is so pretty and my pup is so comfy in it, I'm really satisfied!! Thanks to our little furball, my bank account is on the verge of bankruptcy lol okay bye🥲 Oh and the bottom doesn't collapse at all, I really love that! Highly recommend~!~!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
기존에 대중교통 이용가능 가방들이 부피나 프레임이 커서 들고다니기 부담스러운 부분이 있었는데 접이식으로 가볍게 나왔다길래 구매해봤습니다.

아무래도 프레임이 없다보니 한쪽으로 쏠려서 앉으면 쏠린채로 무게가 실리는 부분이 있으나 그래도 생각보다 가볍고 무게대비 튼튼해보여요.
가볍게 들고다니다가 대중교통 탈일이 있거나 어디 실내로 들어가기 좋을 것 같습니다. 몹시 사용이 기대되는 부분이에요

단점은 접을때 지퍼가 하나이기 때문에 완전 꾹 눌러서 압축 시켜야 제대로 잠글수 있다는게 개인적으로 아쉬운 부분이었습니다. 양쪽에서 지퍼를 닫을 수 있으면 더 좋지 않았을까 합니다. 

사이즈 부분에서 m사이즈를 구매했는데요. L이랑 고민중에 L이 품절되어서 어쩔수 없이 구매했지만 다행히 맞는 것 같아요

저희집 강아지는 2.7kg 푸들이고, 다리는 긴편은 아니에요
목둘레 20 
등길이 30 
가슴길이 33정도 되는데 앉았을때 머리가 지퍼 제봉선 살짝 넘는데 털누르면 제봉선 밑으로 내려와요. 이정도 사이즈면 m사이즈가 휴대성 면에서 충분히 좋다고 생각합니다.


참고로 지퍼 여닫을때 푸들 같은 경우에는 신경안쓰면 털이 찝힐수 있어서 손으로 보호하고 여닫아야 해요

추후에 실사용 후에 리뷰 수정해볼게요

(수정)
써보니까 기대보다 더 편하고 좋습니다.
편안한지 잘 누워있네요 별하나 올렸어요~
reviews.content_en:
I was used to public transit-approved carriers that were bulky or had thick frames, which made them cumbersome to carry around. So when I heard this came in a collapsible, lightweight version, I decided to try it.

Since there's no frame, there is a tendency for it to lean to one side and the weight shifts when sitting that way. But it's still lighter than I expected and looks pretty sturdy for its weight. It seems great for casually carrying around and then using when I need to take public transit or go indoors somewhere. That's the part I'm really looking forward to using.

The downside is that there's only one zipper when folding, so you have to really press hard to compress it properly for it to close right. I wish the zipper could be opened from both sides—that would've been even better.

I purchased the M size. I was torn between L and M, but L was out of stock so I had to go with M, and fortunately it seems to fit well.

My dog is a 2.7kg poodle with relatively short legs.
Neck circumference: 20cm
Back length: 30cm
Chest length: about 33cm
When sitting, her head goes slightly past the zipper seam, but when I push down the fur it goes below the seam. At this size, I think the M is definitely sufficient in terms of portability.

By the way, when opening and closing the zipper, with a poodle like mine you can get fur caught if you're not careful, so you have to protect it with your hand when opening and closing.

I'll update this review after actually using it for a while.

(Update)
After using it, it's even more convenient and better than I expected.
She lies down comfortably in it. I bumped up the rating by one star~

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 갑작스럽게 강아지 동반 어딘가 입장할 일이 생길때가 종종 있는데 그 케이스에 가장 적합한 가방 입니다. 차안에 두고 비상시 사용하기 좋고 또는 워낙 가벼워서 근거리 실내 들어갈때 휙 꺼내서 사용하면 딱! 3.4키로 푸들 M  사이즈 널널하니 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: There are often sudden situations where I need to bring my dog somewhere indoors, and this bag is the most perfect fit for those cases. It's great to keep in the car for emergencies, and since it's so light, I can just pull it out when I need to go indoors for a short distance—perfect! My 3.4kg poodle fits nicely and comfortably in the M size.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
산책하다가 잠깐 실내로 들어갈때 필수템이에요!
딱 원하던 가방이에요🩷
reviews.content_en:
It's an essential item when you stop by indoors during a walk!
It's exactly the bag I wanted 🩷

reviews.name: 경****
reviews.content:
7kg 제한인 항공사에 탑승하게 되서 고민하다가 구매했어요! 비행기 탄 리뷰는 찾지 못해서 리뷰남깁니다
저희 강아지가 다리가 길어서 가방을 세워선 눕지 못하는데 눕히니까 그 안에서 잘 누워있더라구요 처음에 가방+아이무게 측정할때도 높이 보고 안될거 같다고 하시다가 눕혀서 좌석 아래 넣을거라고 하니까 오케이 해주셨고 비행내내 지퍼도 안열리고 잘 왔습니다❤️ 접으면 컴팩트한 사이즈라서 가방이 많지만 보관하기 편해서 너무 좋고 한가지 더 원하는게 있다면 어깨에 맬때 손잡이쪽을 감쌀 수있는 쿠션커버같은걸 추가구매 항목으로 팔면 좋을것같아요!
reviews.content_en: I bought this because I needed to fly on an airline with a 7kg weight limit! I couldn't find reviews about using it on a plane, so I'm leaving this one. Our dog has long legs, so it couldn't lie down when the bag was upright, but once we laid it flat, it laid down comfortably inside. When we first measured the bag + dog's weight, the airline staff said it looked too tall and wouldn't work, but once we explained we'd put it under the seat laying flat, they approved it. The zipper didn't open during the entire flight and everything went smoothly ❤️ When folded, it's a compact size, so even though we have lots of bags, it's easy to store and I really love that. One thing I'd like is if they sold an add-on cushion cover that you could wrap around the handle straps when carrying it on your shoulder!

reviews.name: 오****
reviews.content:
폼피츠 여아 바디 35 몸무게 5.5 가슴둘레 평소 ml/l 착용
풀콧 털이라도 잠금장치 이상무. 미듐이라도 평소 갖고 다니면서 애용중입니다. 맛집. 마트. 카페 등 필용시 찻!!!펼쳐서 넣고 이용하니 편하고 좋아요. 밑받침은 안에 넣으면 구부러짐 1도 없네요.  가격에 비해 괜찮을까 고민고민 하다 구매했는데. 올해 구매템중 1순위입니다.  잘 사용할께요.
reviews.content_en: Female Pomeranian, body size 35, weight 5.5kg, chest circumference usually fits M/L. The lock mechanism works fine even with thick fur. I use this frequently even in medium size while carrying it around daily. Restaurant, grocery store, café - whenever needed, I just unfold and use it, which is super convenient! The bottom support doesn't bend at all when placed inside. I debated whether it was worth the price before buying, but it's my #1 purchase of the year. Will keep using it well.

reviews.name: 원****
reviews.content: 강아지가 노견이라 산책하다 너무 힘들어할때가 있는데 이 가방에 넣어서 안고다니면 너무 좋을거같아요!! 개모차나 기존 가방들은 혼자 산책하면서 가지고 다니면 너무 거추장스럽고 손도 부족하고 힘들더라구요. 접으면 부피도 얼마 안되고 가벼워서 너무 좋아요. 하지만 장시간 안고 다니기에는 확실히 무리가 있어보입니다! 가방이 안정감은 좀 부족해요. 저희 강아지는 3.5키로인데 작은 사이즈 넉넉해요.
reviews.content_en: My dog is a senior, and sometimes gets very tired during walks, so I think it would be great to carry her in this bag! Dog strollers and existing bags are too cumbersome to carry around alone, my hands get full, and it's tiring. When folded, it doesn't take up much space and it's light, which is really nice. However, carrying it for long periods seems definitely difficult! The bag lacks a bit of stability. My dog is 3.5kg and the small size fits her perfectly with room to spare.

reviews.name: 황****
reviews.content:
제주 항공내 탑승시 좋아요
가볍고 고안넓고 가벼워서 6.3키로 나가는 우리 강아지  걱정없이 기내탑승하였답니다
식당.카페 매장방문시에도 아주 편리했어요
reviews.content_en: It's great for boarding on Jeju Air. It's lightweight and spacious, so our 6.3kg dog boarded the cabin without any worries. It was also very convenient when visiting restaurants and cafés!

reviews.name: 석****
reviews.content:
5.6키로 강아지 라지사이즈
넉넉히 잘맞아요. 
누워있어도 널널함.
바닥처짐 1도 없다면 거짓말이고 가벼운거 치고 이정도면 잘 잡아주는 것 같아요.
방석이 없어서 움직일때마다 요리조리 쏠리긴해서 기내용이나 급하게 케이지 필요할때용으로만 쓸 것 같아요.
강아지 얼굴 내밀 수 있게 지퍼 열어놓을때 날개처럼 팔락거려서 좀 불편해보임.
고정시킬 수 있는 단추같은게 있었음 더 좋았을 것 같고 처음 왔을때 냄새가 꽤 나서 냄새 뺄려고 오픈해서 햇볕에 널어놓음.
reviews.content_en: 5.6kg dog, large size. Fits perfectly with plenty of room. Even when lying down, there's still extra space. It's not completely true that there's zero sagging on the bottom - but for how lightweight it is, it holds up pretty well. Since there's no cushion pad, it shifts around a bit with every movement, so I'll probably just use it for cabin travel or when I urgently need a cage. When the zipper is opened so the dog can poke its face out, the flaps flutter around like wings, which is a bit inconvenient. It would've been better if there were buttons or something to secure them. When it first arrived, it had quite a smell, so I unfolded it and laid it out in the sun to air out.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 우리 냥이는 답답한걸 싫어해서 잘안들어가려고 하는데 이 메쉬 가방은 자발적으로 들어가주셔요… 집근처 병원갈때 잠깐 쓰는 용도로 샀어요:) 집이 좁다보니 이동가방도 은근 공간차지하는데 접어서 서랍에 보관하기가 너무 좋아요! 색상도 넘 예쁘네요 취향저격이에요🩵 냥이는 4.2kg이에요 다리가 길진않아서 M사이즈로 구매했는데 높이가 딱이에요🙂
reviews.content_en: My kitty doesn't like feeling cramped, so she usually doesn't want to go in, but she actually goes into this mesh bag on her own... 🩵 I bought it for quick trips to the vet near our place :) Since our apartment is small, the carrier takes up quite a bit of space, but it's so nice to be able to fold it up and store it in a drawer! The color is so pretty too—totally my style 🩵 My cat is 4.2kg and doesn't have long legs, so I got the M size and the height is just right 🙂

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
튼튼하고 예쁘고 실용성 좋아요 ㅎㅎ
주변에도 추천 많이 해야겠어요 그레이 라지도 살려구요💗
reviews.content_en: It's sturdy, pretty, and really practical ㅎㅎ I'll have to recommend it to people around me! I'm thinking of getting the grey large size too 💗

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content:
기차에서 편하게 이용할려고 넉넉한거로 샀어요
사용후기는 너무 만족합니다 이동가능하지만 딱딱한 이동장이 아니라서 그냥 안고 있는것같아 좋았습니다
reviews.content_en: I got the bigger size because I wanted to use it comfortably on the train. After using it, I'm so satisfied! It's portable, but unlike a rigid carrier, it feels more like I'm just holding her—I really like that about it

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 산책을 좋아하던 강아지가 몇일전에 공놀이를 하다가 삐끗했는데 요즘 잘 안걸을려고 해서 가방들고 나갔거든요 포켓팝 폴더블 메쉬가방 오늘 처음 시착했는데  안정감이 있는지 잘 앉아 있어서 좋아요
reviews.content_en: My dog used to love walks, but a few days ago she twisted something while playing ball, so she's been reluctant to walk lately. So I took her out in a carrier today. I tried the POCKET POP foldable mesh bag for the first time, and I'm happy with it because she sits well in it—it feels secure

reviews.content: 아주아주 잘 쓰고 있습니다 잠깐씩 어디 데려갈때 갖고 나가기 너무 좋아요! 가볍고 가방에 넣고 다니면 되니까 좋아요! 잠깐 병원 갈때도 좋고!
reviews.content_en: I'm using it so much! It's so convenient to take with me when I need to take her somewhere for a quick trip! It's light and I can just put it in my bag, which is great! Perfect for quick vet visits too!

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content:
자주 있는 일은 아니지만 카페 갈 때, 접은 상태로 미니백처럼 들고가서 입구에서 가방 펼쳐 안에 넣고 들어가니, 아주 좋네요 
전에는 가벼운 이동가방이어도 함께 가지고 다니기 무거운 짐이었어요
reviews.content_en: It's not something that happens often, but when I go to a cafe, I fold it up like a mini bag and carry it, then unfold it at the entrance and put my dog inside before going in—it's really great! Before, even though it was a lightweight carrier bag, it was still heavy to carry around with me.

reviews.name: 사****
reviews.content: 가방이 몇개 있어 구매할지 몇번 고민하다 구매했는데 완전 잘한거같아요. 가방오자마자 들어가는 우리 망고^^ 우선 넘 가볍고 접어서 휴대가능한게 넘넘 좋아요. 가방 착용감도 안정적이고 이쁘기까지 하네요. 가방 어깨에 메면 편한 느낌 최고네요.우리강아지들을 위해 좋은제품 만들어주셔서 감사해요~🐶❤️❤️❤️❤️
reviews.content_en: I debated a few times whether to buy it since I already have several bags, but I'm so glad I did! Our Mango got right in as soon as the bag arrived^^ First of all, it's so light and the fact that I can fold it up and carry it is amazing. The fit is stable and it looks pretty too. When I wear it on my shoulder, it feels so comfortable. Thank you for making such a great product for our dogs~🐶❤️❤️❤️❤️

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
완전 만능가방이네요💖

8.5키로 허리길고 다리짧은 강아지입니다! 다리가 짧아서 그런거겠지만 앉아있을때도 지퍼가 잠겨요~ 가방도 넉넉하고 접이식이라서 차 한켠에 놓아도 자리 안차지해요!!! 

밑바닥도 의외로 안쳐져서 아주 유용하게 쓸수있을거같아요!!!

체형 참고하세요~~!
reviews.content_en:
It's like an all-purpose bag💖

My dog is 8.5kg with a long body and short legs! Because of the short legs, the zipper stays closed even when she's sitting~The bag is spacious and foldable, so even when I toss it in the corner of my car, it doesn't take up much space!!!

The bottom is surprisingly sturdy too, so I think I'll be able to use it really well!!!

Keep your dog's body shape in mind~~!

reviews.name: 강****
reviews.content: 30일부터 순차출고라 이번 여행에는 못 쓸거 같아 아쉬웠는데 다행히 예상 출고일보다 빨리 도착해서 여행에 챙겨왔어요!! 3.7키로 마르고 허리가 긴 체형인데 딱 적당히 잘 들어가져서 여행에서 유용하게 사용하고 있습니다👍🏻
reviews.content_en: It said sequential shipping starting from the 30th, so I was sad I wouldn't be able to use it for this trip, but fortunately it arrived earlier than expected and I was able to bring it along! My dog is 3.7kg with a lean, long-bodied frame, and it fits just right. I've been using it conveniently on my trip👍🏻

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 휴대용으로 편합니다. 생각보다 바닥도 튼튼해서 쳐짐도 없고 가벼워요
reviews.content_en: It's convenient for portability. The bottom is sturdier than I expected with no sagging, and it's lightweight.

reviews.name: 양****
reviews.content: 휴대하기도 간편하고 산책하다가 메쉬백에 넣으면 실내 공간에 들어갈 때 유용하게 사용할 수 있어서 좋아요.
reviews.content_en: It's easy to carry around, and it's really convenient to use when you put it in the mesh bag before entering indoor spaces during walks.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content:
5.8키로, 등길이34, 등높이35 강아지 크기 좋고, 신기하게 바닥이 안쳐지네요.
쿠션형가방, 백팩, 슬링백×2 (한개는 차량보관) 강아지 한마리가 이미 가방을 네개 사용중인데, 아래와 같은 상황에 필요할거같아요.

1. 오랜 산책시 카페나 가게 들어갈때. 
2. 유모차를 가지고 여행이나 나들이갈때 보조용으로.  선박이나 케이블카 등 탈때 꼭 가방이 필요한데, 유모차가 있을땐 모양잡힌 가방은 짐이 되요 (덩치가 있어 L사이즈 가방들이라 빈상태이어도 작은 캐리어만함)
3. 여름 더울때, 구멍 숭숭~

접은 크기는 작진않아요... 튼실한 여행용 보조가방 크기정도라 집근처 산책시 들고다니는 가방엔 안들어가네요. 이 가방을 가지고 외출할때는 배낭이나 큰 숄더백을 들고가야하겠습니다.

강아지에게 아주 편한 가방은 아니지만 휴대하다가 잠시 태우기엔 정말 유용하고, 저처럼 이미 가방이 여러개 있어도 용도가 겹치지않으니 구입 고민이시면 추천합니나
reviews.content_en: Perfect size for my 5.8kg pup with a back length of 34cm and height of 35cm, and surprisingly the bottom doesn't sag. My dog is already using 4 bags (cushion-style, backpack, and 2 sling bags - one stored in the car), but I think we'll need this one for situations like: 1. When going to cafes or shops during longer walks. 2. As a backup when traveling or going out with a stroller - we really need a bag for ferries or cable cars, but when we have a stroller, a bulky bag becomes extra luggage (since our L-size bags are so big they look like small carriers even when empty). 3. During hot summers - all those ventilation holes! The folded size isn't that small though... it's about the size of a sturdy travel bag, so it doesn't fit in my everyday walking bag. When I take this bag out, I'll need to bring a backpack or large shoulder bag. It's not the most comfortable bag for my dog, but it's really useful for quick trips, and since I already have several bags, there's no overlap in purpose. If you're on the fence about buying, I'd recommend it.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
지난주 제주 여행할때 쓰고 싶었는데 고민하던 찰나에 품절이 되어서 2차로 받게 되었어요ㅎ 우리 강아지가 6.4키로 다리긴 왕푸들인데 라지사이즈 불편하지 않을정도로 여유있어요
가장 맘에드는건 접었을때 컴팩트한 사이즈이고 애견동반이 되는 식당이나 카페인데 이동장이 필요한곳이라면 정말 유용하게 사용할 수 있을거 같아요! 밑판이 정말 탄탄해서 잠깐씩 사용할때 강아지가 불편해 하거나 답답해 하지 않을것 같아요.
택시나 버스 지하철 기차 같은건 가능할거 같은데
기내 사용도 가능할지는 모르겠네요~!
reviews.content_en: I was hoping to use it during my Jeju trip last week, but it sold out while I was deciding, so I got it on the second batch 😂 My dog is a tall toy poodle weighing 6.4kg, and the Large size has plenty of room without being uncomfortable. What I love most is how compact it is when folded, and it would be really useful at dog-friendly restaurants or cafes where a carrier is required! The bottom is really sturdy, so my dog won't feel uncomfortable or cramped during short uses. I think it would work for taxis, buses, subways, and trains, but I'm not sure about in-flight use~!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
이동가방이 필요해서 한참 고민하다 옆으로 매는 조금 라이트한 종류로 찾고 있었습니다. 맘에드는 가방이 없었는데 만우절 기획 어쩌구가 갑자기 떠서 저도 모르게 눌러 봤더니 ㅎㅎ
사이트 홍보보고 들어오게 된 1인이 되었네요.
여기서 초록색 이동가방 보고 딱이다 하면서 장바구니 담아 사이트 구경중..저를 사로잡는 이 요물가방..
이게 뭔가요~~ 제 니즈를 100% 충족시켜주는 항목들.
-이미 백팩 스타일의 탄탄한 가방 있음. 1박 이상 여행시 필수템 임. 
-크고 단단한 가방 말고, 자리 차지하는 가방 말고 좀 가볍고 편하게 사용할 이동가방 필요.
-옆으로 매는 스타일이 좀 가벼워 보여 서칭 중 이 사이트에서 초록색상 맘에드는 것 찾음.
-그러나 또 고민된건, 평소 자리차지 하는 가방이 아닌 산책할때 가볍게 챙길 수 있는 스타일이 필요.
-내가 왜 이동가방을 사야하는 지를 다시 생각함
-기분파 강아지가 산책 시 물통과 함께 쓱 챙길 수 있는 가방이면서 기본산책 30분 이상 하는데 생각보다 멀리 갔을 경우 집 복귀 시 강아지 편안하게 집으로 올 수 있는 가방이 필요함을 다시 기억함.
-그러다 찾은 가방
-평상시 접어 지퍼로 닫아주면 작은 책하나 사이즈, 펼지면 바닥은 탄탄하게 잡아주고 나머지 옆부분은 메쉬 면재질로 되서 답답해 보이지 않는 제품임
포켓팝 폴더블 메쉬백. 이 디자인 만든 사람 내 머릿속을 보고 간줄~ 하면서 구매했습니다^^ 
첫구매로 할인 되었고 할인없이 구매하면 좀 사악한 금액이기도 함. 배송은 하루반나절 걸린듯(서울도착기준)
사이즈가 좀 고민되었지만 5kg넘고 롱다리 강이지들은 L사이즈 좋을 듯하네요.
저희 강아지는 4.5kg, 등길이 33cm, 서있을때 머리높이까지 35cm나와 M사이즈 구매하니 딱 좋습니다. 
전 이미 백만배 맘에드는 중👍🏻
reviews.content_en: I needed a pet carrier and spent a lot of time thinking about it - I was looking for something lighter that could be worn across the body. I couldn't find a bag I liked, and then an April Fools' Day promotion suddenly popped up, so I clicked without even thinking 😂 I became one of those people who came through a site promotion. When I saw the green carrier bag on here, I thought 'that's it!' and added it to my cart while browsing... this bewitching bag has captured me. What is this~~ These items fulfill 100% of my needs: - Already have a sturdy backpack-style bag. Essential for trips of 1+ nights. - Don't want a big, bulky bag that takes up space. Need a lighter, more convenient carrier. - Was searching for a side-sling style that looked lighter, found one I like in green on this site. - But I was also thinking I need something that doesn't take up space normally - a lightweight style I can grab for walks. - Reconsidered why I even need a carrier. - Remembered that my moody pup needs a bag they can grab quickly with a water bottle during walks, and for basic 30+ minute walks, if we end up going farther than expected, I need a comfortable way to get my dog home. - That's how I found this bag. - It's normally folded and zipped to the size of a small book, but when opened, the bottom is sturdy while the sides are mesh material so it doesn't look stuffy. POCKET POP Foldable Mesh Bag. The designer of this must have been reading my mind~~ and I purchased it 😊 Got a discount on my first purchase, and it's quite pricey without the discount. Shipping took about a day and a half (based on Seoul arrival). Was a bit worried about the size, but for dogs over 5kg with long bodies, L-size seems great. My pup is 4.5kg with a back length of 33cm and a head height of 35cm when standing, so the M-size I bought is just perfect. I'm already loving it a million times over 👍🏻

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
🧡개사원 솔직리뷰🧡
다들 그럴 때 있지 않나요? 대중교통 탈 때만 이동가방이 필요한데, 그 잠깐을 위해 하루종일 바리바리 이동가방을 들고 다녀할 때...! 아무리 가벼운 이동가방이라고 해도 부피와 무게는 정말 큰 짐인데요. 바잇미생들이 정말 필요해서 만든 폴더블 메쉬백입니다!
나무는 5.6kg / 등길이 34cm의 허리와 다리가 긴 체형의 강아지라 L를 착용했는데요. 똑바로 앉았을 때는 높이가 딱 맞고, 엎드렸을 때는 위에 공간이 널널하게 남아요!
바닥 평판이 탄탄해서 처짐은 없는데, 나무처럼 쿠션에 익숙한 친구들은 초반에 엎드리는 것을 낯설어할 수 있어요! 그렇지만 한 두 번 가방을 이용하다보니 이젠 자연스럽게 엎드려서 편하게 쉬더라구요!
강쥐와 함께 이동하는 것은 저같은 뚜벅이들에게 큰 마음을 먹는 것이 필요한데요. M사이즈 기준 330g으로 휴대하기도 정말 가볍고, 필요할 때만 펴서 사용할 수 있어서 정말 추천드립니다! 
뚜벅이 보호자님들의 어깨 절대 지켜...!!
reviews.content_en: 🧡Honest Review from a Dog Parent🧡 Haven't we all been there? When you only need a pet carrier for public transportation, but end up carrying it around all day for those few minutes...! Even the lightest carriers are a real burden in terms of bulk and weight. The team at BITE ME created this foldable mesh bag because they genuinely needed it! My dog Namu weighs 5.6kg with a back length of 34cm and has a long, slender build, so I got the L size. When he sits upright, the height is just right, and when he lies down, there's plenty of room on top! The bottom panel is sturdy with no sagging, but dogs like Namu who are used to cushions might find lying on a hard bottom unfamiliar at first! However, after using the bag once or twice, he now naturally lies down and rests comfortably. Traveling with your pup requires commitment, especially for those of us who rely on public transit. At just 330g for the M-size, it's incredibly light to carry and can only be opened when needed, so I really recommend it! I'm protecting all you transit-dependent pet parents' shoulders...!!

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
8.6kg 비글믹스 강아띠를 키우는 사람입니다. 
아무래도 꽈악 끼는 감이 있지만 단모종이라 꽤괜입니다. 근데 같은 스펙에 장모종이면 정말 솜가방될것같아보여요 ㅋㅋ 
타임세일때 6만원정도에 L사이즈 득템이라니ㅠ항상 살까말까 고민된 가방이었는데 걍 가성비로,,내 마음속에 품게 되었습니다. 저처럼 살말살말 고민하시는 중소형견 견주분이라면 충분히 살 만하다고 여겨집니다. 바닥판이 약할 줄 알았는데 의외로 거진 9키로의 거대한 무게를 잘 버텨내고 가라앉지 않아요! 다만 강아지가 무거울수록 어깨에 무리가 가는건 어쩔 수 없는거죠 ㅎ,, 그치만? 잠깐잠깐 대중교통 탈 때만 쓰고 접어서 들고댕길라고 산거라 전 매우매우 만족해요>_< 폴더블 가방 너무 혁신적이야요..그냥 사세여..네 글구 디자인도 넘 기여움.
reviews.content_en: I have an 8.6kg Beagle mix puppy. It does feel a bit snug, but since it's short-haired, it's quite manageable. Though if it were a long-haired dog with the same specs, it would look like a real cotton bag lol 😂 I got the L size for about 60,000 won during a time sale—it's been a bag I always went back and forth on buying, but honestly for the value... it's won my heart. If you're a small-to-medium breed owner like me who keeps deliberating, it's definitely worth buying. I thought the base would be weak, but surprisingly it holds up really well with the hefty weight of almost 9kg and doesn't sag! Of course, the heavier the dog, the more strain it puts on your shoulders lol,, but? I bought it mainly to use briefly on public transportation and fold it up to carry, so I'm very very satisfied >_< The foldable bag is just so innovative.. just buy it.. And the design is super cute too.

reviews.name: 은****
reviews.content:
5kg 강아지 L 사이즈로 구매했습니다 ㅎㅎ
목이랑 허리가 긴 편여서 앉거나 서있으면
머리 부분만 조금 껴요(어쩔 수 없죠 그건)
이동하는 중에는 엎드려있으니깐 괜찮아요
​
뚜벅 주인 이왕 가벼워지는 김에
4.5kg 강아지 M사이즈 샀다는 후기들을 봐서 고민했는데
욕심 버리고 L 사이즈 잘 샀습니다..🫶
​
L를 사야지 엎드려있어도 널널하게 편하게 가는 거 같아요

바닥도 생각보다 튼튼해서 잘견더요
바닥이 흰색이라서 조금 불안해요 ㅋ⫬ㅋ⫬ㅋ⫬ㅋ⫬ㅋ⫬ㅋ⫬ㅋ⫬ㅋ⫬ㅋ 

가격 사악했지만 여름에 저도 강아지도 편할거같아서 만족합니다!
reviews.content_en: I purchased the L size for my 5kg dog 😊 Since my dog has a longer neck and waist, when sitting or standing, just the head sticks out a bit (can't help that). But during transit, since they're lying down, it's fine. As a fellow pet parent always looking to lighten the load, I saw reviews where people bought the M size for 4.5kg dogs and was torn, but I'm glad I went with L without being greedy 🫶 With L, even when lying down, there's plenty of space for comfort. The base is sturdier than expected, so it holds up well. I'm a bit worried since the bottom is white lol 😅 The price was steep, but I'm satisfied since it'll be comfortable for both me and my dog in the summer!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
왕티즈라서 다리가길어요 목도길고 ㅎㅎ 앉은키도 크네요~~
라지사이즈 요정도 느낌~ 3.8키로에요. 앉아도 머리까지 다 커버되는 사이즈를 원했는데.... 마트델구가면 절대 엎드리지않아요 ㅋ 앉아서 구경하느라... 그래도 접이식이라 휴대용은 편할듯하고 이동가방 이너용으로 사용해도 기존가방만 있는것보다는 편해요. 이제품은 메인이라기보다는 세컨드용으로 구매하시면 좋을듯해요~ 있으면 여러모로 편해요~ 바닥도 탄탄해서 단시간이면 단독사용도 가능할듯하네요. 소형견이면 간편휴대해서 공공장소, 대중교통 이용시 진짜 쓸모가 많아서 강추합니다~
reviews.content_en: Since he's a Toy Poodle, he has long legs, a long neck too lol 😂 and a big sitting height~~ It feels like a large-sized bag for a 3.8kg dog. I wanted a size that covers the head when sitting down.... but he never lies down when we go to the mart 😅 he just sits and looks around... Still, since it's foldable, it's convenient for portability, and even using it as an inner bag for a main carrier is more convenient than just having the existing bag. This product is better for secondary use rather than as your main bag~ but having it makes things convenient in many ways~ The bottom is sturdy, so it even seems usable on its own for short periods. If you have a small dog, I highly recommend it for easy portability during public outings and public transportation~

reviews.name: 민****
reviews.content:
뚜벅이 견주로써 유명한 이동가방들은 다 사용중이지만 이런 휴대성은 처음이라 구매했어요! 
모든 외출은 다 우리집 털뭉치랑 함께하는데 어딜가든 이동가방은 거의 필수라 항상 챙기지만 이동할때를 제외하고선 애기 걷게 하거나 할땐 무겁고 거추장스러운 짐짝이 되어버리는 이동가방인데 이건 접을 수 있다는게 너무 편리한거 같아요👍🏻 
그렇다고 밑에 받침이 약해서 쳐지는것도 아니고 넘 튼튼하게 잘 받쳐집니다 !! 
조금 아쉬운점은 지퍼 닫을때 털끼임 방지가 안되어있어서 자칫 잘못하면 털이 낄수도 있겠다 싶어 잘 보고 닫아줍니당
앞으론 이동가방에 바리바리 싸들고 다닐일보단 저도 제 예쁜 가방 챙기고 우리 애기를 위해서 요 폴더백 챙기면 딱이에요❤️‍🔥
reviews.content_en: As a pet parent who takes my dog everywhere, I use all the famous pet carriers out there, but this level of portability was new to me, so I bought it! All my outings are with my little furball, and a pet carrier is pretty much essential wherever I go, but other than during transit, when I let my pup walk or something, the carrier becomes this heavy, cumbersome piece of baggage—but the fact that this one folds is SO convenient 👍🏻 And the base isn't weak and sagging either; it holds up really sturdy!! The only slight downside is there's no fur-pinch guard when closing the zipper, so if you're not careful, fur could get caught, so I'm careful to check before closing. From now on, instead of dragging around a carrier stuffed to the brim, I'll just grab my nice purse and this foldable bag for my baby—perfect! ❤️‍🔥

reviews.name: 현****
reviews.content:
등길이 다리길이 긴 마른 체형 3.05kg 말티푸에요
그레이컬러가 예뻐서 사이즈가 m밖에 없길래 구매했는데 
사이즈는 적당해요:)
메쉬벽도 튼튼하구 바닥면도 잘 잡아주네요
지퍼 잠굴때는 안쪽 지퍼면 접히는 부분만 잘 넣어서 잠궈주시면 잘 잠궈져요 :)
사이즈 큰걸로 할까 고민했었는데 m사이즈로 잘 선택한것같습니다:>!
단점은 어깨끈이 흘러내리지않게 잡아주었으면 좋겠어요
미끄럼방지나 어깨 쪽 보호되는걸로 따로 구매할 생각입니다~
저렴하지 않은 가격이라 어깨끈까지 조금 더 보완해주셨으면 좋았겠다는 생각이 드네요 .. ㅎㅎ
reviews.content_en: I have a 3.05kg Maltipoo with a long back and long legs, lean build. I bought it because the grey color looked pretty and only the M size was available, and the size is just right :) The mesh walls are sturdy and the base holds well too. When closing the zipper, just tuck in the folding part on the inside of the zipper and it closes well :) I was debating whether to go bigger, but I think choosing the M size was the right call :>! The downside is I wish the shoulder straps had some non-slip design. I'm planning to buy separate anti-slip pads or shoulder protectors~ Since it's not a cheap price, I wish they'd included a bit more care in the shoulder straps too.. 😅

reviews.name: 연****
reviews.content:
등길이 33과 35, 40 강아지를 키웁니다. 33과 35 강아지 (5-6킬로대)를 위해서 샀습니다.

-무게, 접이식 다 마음에 드는 점이지만, 의외로 리뷰에 안 써있는 점은, 내부 바닥이 물티슈로 닦이는 점입니다. 

솔직하게 지금 깔린 천 보다 조금만 더 내수성 있는 천이어도 좋을 것 같습니다. 많은 산책 가방이 더러워진 강아지 발 그대로 올라가서 쉬도록 되어서 가방이 오염되어도 세탁이 어려웠습니다. 천이나 쿠션을 매번 빨 수도 없고, 가방 자체에 발이 닿아서 더러워질 수 있으니까요.

이 가방은 그 고민에서 비교적 해방되었습니다. 밑판을 덮은 천 색이 어둡고, 내수성이 강한 건 아니지만 그렇다고 다른 가방처럼 ‘사람이 만지는 포근함’을 강조해서 오염되기 쉬운 천을 쓴 건 아닙니다. 만약 원하면 개개인이 쿠션이나 패드를 지참해서 깔면 되니 더 좋습니다. 

밑판 빼면 세탁도 쉽고요.
이 점이 무게, 편리함만큼 압도하는 장점이라고 봅니다.

-등길이 33, 35강아지는 들어갔지만 40강아지는 다리도 길고 9킬로라서 (2XL입는강아지) 일단 가방에 넣어보긴 했지만 얼굴이 위로 튀어나와서 뉴욕 같은 곳처럼 ‘어찌되었든 어딘가에 넣기만 하면 되는 곳‘이 아닌 이상 쓸 수 없긴 합니다.(이 강아지 용으로 구입한 건 아니지만 고민해는 분이 계시면 참고하시길 바라며)

- 바닥도 균형을 잘 유지합니다.

- 받자마자 냄새는 나지만 한동안 펼쳐두면 빠질 냄새입니다.

-처음엔 꼭 검은색을 사려고 했는데 핑크색 끈 색이 침착한 핑크가 아닌 점(끈 색이 튀어버림), 바닥이 아이보리인 점, 여름이라선지 한낮에 산책하는 게 아님에도 검은 메쉬가 여름이라 빛을 흡수할 것 같아서 무난한 그레이로 구입. 밑바닥 (케이스가 되는 면) 부분이 어두운 제품도 나오면 좋겠습니다. 끈도 덜 오염되는 걸로요.
reviews.content_en:
I have three dogs with back lengths of 33, 35, and 40cm. I bought this for my dogs measuring 33 and 35 (in the 5-6kg range).

- I really like the weight and foldable design, but there's something not mentioned in other reviews: the interior bottom can be wiped clean with wet wipes.

To be honest, I think even just a slightly more water-resistant fabric than what's currently used would be great. Many walking bags get dirty from muddy paw prints, making them hard to wash. You can't wash the fabric or cushion every time, and the bag itself can get dirty from paw contact.

This bag has largely solved that problem. The fabric covering the bottom is dark-colored, and while it's not super water-resistant, it's not like other bags that emphasize "soft touch for humans" with easily soiled fabric. If you want, you can bring your own cushion or pad to place inside, which is even better.

Besides the bottom, it's easy to wash too. I think this advantage is just as significant as the weight and convenience.

- My 33 and 35cm dogs fit fine, but my 40cm dog with long legs weighing 9kg (fits 2XL clothes) has his face sticking out the top when placed in the bag. Unless you're somewhere like New York where "just putting it anywhere works," you can't really use it for him. (Not purchased for this dog, but wanted to note this for anyone considering it.)

- The bottom maintains good balance.

- There's a smell right out of the box, but it fades after being left out for a while.

- I originally wanted to buy black, but the pink strap color wasn't a subtle pink (the strap color stands out too much), the bottom is ivory, and since it's summer, the black mesh would absorb heat even though I don't walk during the hottest parts of the day. So I went with gray instead. I wish there were versions with a darker bottom (the case side). And straps that don't get as dirty.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
완전 신박템 포켓팝 폴더블 메쉬백💛

잠깐 마트갈때 차에서 딱 꺼내서 바로 메쉬백에 넣으면
마트, 카페, 실내공간에 간편하게 들어갈 수 있어요!

접으면 너무 작고 조금해서 간편하게 들고 다닐 수 있어요.
아가도 너무 편하세 누워있고 사진에 보시다시피 처짐도 없답니다!~~
고민은 구매만 늦출뿐~~~ 당장 구매하세요!
reviews.content_en:
Such an innovative item! POCKET POP Foldable Mesh Bag 💛

When I quickly need to go to the store, I just pull it out from the car and pop my pup right in the mesh bag!
It's convenient for malls, cafes, and indoor spaces!

When folded, it's so compact and light that I can carry it around easily.
My baby is really comfortable lying down in it, and as you can see in the photos, there's no sagging!~~

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
강아지 입양 후 구매한 수많은 용품 중 가장 만족스러운 제품입니다. 산책 중 갑자기 쇼핑을 하거나 대중교통을 이용해야 할 때 바로 꺼내서 사용할 수 있어 매우 편리합니다.
전철 타기전에 가방을 펼쳐 바닥에 놓기만 해도 아이가 스스로 들어갈 정도로 익숙하게 사용해요. 가방이 망 형태라 답답하지 않고, 바닥도 튼튼해서 5kg 아이가 움직여도 접히지 않습니다.
양면 지퍼라 한쪽을 완전히 열어주면 아이가 앉아서 바깥 구경을 할 수 있는 점도 좋습니다. 또한 지퍼가 없는 카시트 위에 포개어 사용하는 등 활용도가 높습니다.
우리 아이는 쿠션형 가방보다 이 가방을 더 좋아하고, 저는 가볍고 휴대가 간편해서 매우 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en:
This is the most satisfying product among the many items I've purchased since adopting my dog. It's very convenient because I can pull it out and use it right away when I suddenly need to shop or use public transportation during a walk.
My dog is so familiar with it that even just laying the bag out on the ground before taking the subway makes him go right in on his own. Since the bag is mesh-shaped, it's not stuffy, and the bottom is sturdy enough that even when my 5kg pup moves around, it doesn't collapse.
I also like that with the two-way zipper, I can open one side completely so my dog can sit and look outside. Additionally, it's highly versatile—I can even place it on top of a car seat without a zipper.
My dog actually prefers this bag to cushioned carriers, and I'm very satisfied because it's light and easy to carry.

reviews.content:

가성비 최고! 강추합니다🐶✨
reviews.content_en:
💗Best purchase of this summer!💗
Folds down like a pouch, so it's easy to store!
The mesh material provides great ventilation!

It's lightweight and
my puppy feels so comfortable being inside ☺️

You can attach a keyring for customization fun.

reviews.name: 전****
reviews.content:
딱 산책하다가 갑자기 가방 필요할때 사용하기 좋은 편리한가방이에요! 
산책나가면 강아지 생각해서 오래 걷다오려해도 돌아올생각에 힘들어서 망설였는데 이거 생긴후로는 편히다닐 수 있어 좋아요.
가방이 가벼워서 저는 크로스 바디리쉬에 걸어두고 다니는데 갑자기 대중교통 이용할때는 슥 펼치기만히면되니 넘 좋습니다ㅠㅠ✨❤️

원래 가방 이용하던 강아지라 꺼내자마자 자기껀줄알고 바로 들어갔어요 ㅎㅎ🤎🤎
reviews.content_en:
It's such a convenient bag, perfect for when you suddenly need it while out for a walk!
I used to hesitate on longer walks because I'd be thinking about my dog and wanted to stay out longer, but struggling with the thought of heading back. Now that I have this, I can walk comfortably!
Since the bag is so light, I keep it attached to my cross-body leash, and when I suddenly need public transportation, I just unfold it—so convenient! ㅠㅠ✨❤️

Since my dog was already used to bags, as soon as I pulled it out, he knew it was his and went right in! ㅎㅎ🤎🤎

reviews.name: 엄****
reviews.content:
8.6kg 똥개믹스인데 다리가 짧아 앉은키가 낮아서 그런지 다행히 지퍼도 잘 잠기고 휴대성은 더더욱 좋아요!! 
이 정도 중소형 사이즈 강아지 넣을 이동가방이나 캐리어 쓰려면 어깨근육 파열되기 직전까지 가는데.. 진짜 만드신 분 감사합니다- 그리고 강아지가 엄청 겁이 많은 성격인데 매쉬라 숨쉬기도 용이하고 금방 상태를 파악하기가 좋아서 대만족입니다. 참고로 사이즈 안맞을까 걱정했는데 리뷰에 8키로대 강아지 있능거보고 구매했어요ㅠㅠ 짱짱맨!!
reviews.content_en:
My 8.6kg mixed breed has short legs and a low sitting height, so thankfully the zipper closes well and the portability is even better!!
If I tried using a regular travel bag or carrier for a small-to-medium sized dog like this, I'd be on the verge of a shoulder muscle tear... I'm really grateful to whoever made this. Also, my dog is very easily scared, and since it's mesh, he can breathe easily and I can quickly check on his condition—I'm very satisfied! Just in case about the size, I saw there were 8kg+ dogs in the reviews and decided to buy. So glad I did! ㅠㅠ Awesome!!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
허리긴 푸들/4.6키로/ 목21 가슴41 등길이33 
미듐이랑 라지 너무 고민고민 하다가 좀더 넓게 엎드리라고 라지 구매했어요!!!

가벼운 가방(특히 비행)이 필요하시면 구매할민 합니당
reviews.content_en:
Long-bodied poodle / 4.6kg / Neck 21, Chest 41, Back length 33
I was torn between medium and large, but decided to go with large for a bit more room for him to lie down!!!!
I had seen a friend's before, so I looked carefully and bought it!
The material is somewhat stiff so the mesh part doesn't bend easily! The bottom is also sturdy, which is great.
But! The price seems a bit high ㅠㅠㅠ
Without a sale or coupon, there would be a lot of hesitation about buying it.

If you need a light bag (especially for flights), go ahead and buy it!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 예약 걸어두고 엄청 기대하고 있었어요. 저는 다른회사 제품 구매했다가 바잇미 폴더블 메쉬백 발견하고 당장 취소후 기다리더라도 구매한 경우인데요.폴더블이라서 버스나 지하철에서만 사용하고 그외 이동시에는 접어서 간편하게 움직일수있어서 아주만족해요. 다만 저희집 강아지 할머니가 8키로가 넘는 관계로 어깨에 들쳐맸을때 피멍이 생긴다능요ㅜ 어깨보호패드도 따로 팔았음 좋겠습니다
reviews.content_en: I pre-ordered and was really looking forward to it. I had bought another company's product but discovered BITE ME's Foldable Mesh Bag and immediately cancelled to wait for this one. Since it's foldable, I only use it on buses or subways, and for other travel I can fold it up and move around conveniently—I'm very satisfied! However, since my dog's grandmother weighs over 8kg, when I carry it over my shoulder, I get bruises. ㅜ I wish they sold separate shoulder protection pads.

reviews.name: 방****
reviews.content: 생각했던 것보다 더 튼튼해요! 가볍고 들고다니기 편한걸 원했는데 딱 맞는거 같아요:)) 강아지도 좋아하고 안에서 잘 기다리네요 너무 만족합니다! + 강아지가 원래 가방 안에 있는걸 답답해하는데 이건 모두 망사라 답답해하지 않는게 큰 장점입니다!(강아지가 몸무게에 비해 허리가 얇고 긴편이에요)
reviews.content_en: It's much sturdier than I expected! I wanted something light and easy to carry, and this seems perfect :)) My dog loves it and waits well inside. I'm so satisfied! + My dog originally hated being inside bags, but since this is all mesh, she doesn't mind it—that's a huge advantage! (My dog's waist is thin and long relative to her weight)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
1) 우리 강아지가 블랙이라 글로시블랙을 구입했는데, 아이보리 컬러에 비해 배색매치가 촌스러워요. 왜이렇게 여러 색상을 사용했는지... 끈색상을 핑크보다는 바닥 색상과 같은 아이보리로 통일시켜주거나, 블랙으로 하면 오히려 고급스러울 것 같네요~
2) 울 강아지가 5kg라서 사이즈 결정이 애매했는데, 딱 맞는것보다는 조금 여유있는게 낫겠지... 하는 생각으로 L사이즈를 구입했어요. 사이즈는 넉넉한건 상관없는데 윗부분 곡선부분이 너무 툭튀어나와서 보기 안 좋네요. 곡선부분을 조금만 더 굴려주시면 착장시에도 불편하지 않으면서도 자연스러울 것 같아요~
3) 바닥매트는 축쳐지지않고 생각보다 지지가 잘 되요.
4)접었을 때 생각보다 부피가 좀 있어서(아마도 바닥매트때문이라고 생각되지만...) 산책시 간단히 들고 나가기에는 좀 무리가 있을 것 같긴한데, 일단 장 볼 때는 유용하게 사용할 것 같아요^^
reviews.content_en:
1) I bought glossy black since my dog is black, but the color combination looks tacky compared to the ivory. I'm not sure why so many colors were used... I think it would look more elegant if the strap color was unified with the bottom color as ivory, or black instead of pink.
2) My dog weighs 5kg, so sizing was ambiguous. I thought having a little extra room would be better than a tight fit, so I bought the L size. The size isn't an issue, but the curved top part sticks out too much and doesn't look good. If the curve was rounded a bit more, it would look more natural when worn without being inconvenient.
3) The bottom mat doesn't sag and supports better than expected.
4) When folded, it takes up a bit more space than I thought (probably because of the bottom mat), so it might be difficult to quickly grab for walks. But for shopping trips, I think it'll be useful ^^

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
계속 고민하다가 메가주에서 실물 보고 구매하게 됐어요:)

Miniature Schnauzer / 6.8kg / Back length 33cm / L size

reviews.content:

이게 무슨산책가방이야 ㅋㅋㅋ

reviews.content_en:
Included external photos
Looks like a pouch, right?? ㅎㅎ
This is a walking bag?? ㅋㅋㅋ

Thought it would be useful for restaurants, cafes, or using public transportation when I suddenly need a bag while out for a walk, so I bought it! ㅎㅎ

My dog is anxious so carrying it over my shoulder keeps slipping and feels heavy, so I skip that.
A carrier wrap blocks my view, gets sweaty and hot, so I skip that too.
This seems really useful when I just need it for a moment! ㅎㅎ

The mesh is tall so even a long-legged friend can zip up completely—that's nice! ~
Why didn't this come out sooner? 👍👍

reviews.name: 서****
reviews.content:
사이즈 고민중이었는데 L사이즈 품절이라 M구매했어요
저희 애들한텐 M이 아주 적절하네요 L은 너무 클뻔했어요
아래 강아지는 목/가슴/등길이 각각 25/35/24cm이고 체중은 3.3-3.5 정도인 중단모치와와인데
잘 앉아있고 일어서도 불편해하지 않네요~ 
접었을때 생각보다 무게랑 부피가 크지만 갑자기 필요할 때 쓰기 참 좋을 것 같아요!
reviews.content_en:
I was deciding on size but went with M since L was out of stock.
M is perfect for my kids. L would've been too big.
The bottom dog has Neck/Chest/Back length of 25/35/24cm and weighs about 3.3-3.5kg. It's a small long-haired Chihuahua and Pomeranian mix.
They sit well and even standing up doesn't seem uncomfortable for them ~
When folded, it's heavier and bulkier than expected, but it's really convenient to have when you suddenly need it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
10키로 퍼그가 쓰고있는데 사이즈 너무너무 딱이에요 적응하니깐 안에서 엎드리기도 합니다 ㅎㅎ

맨날 출퇴근 같이해서 ㅠㅠ 두툼한가방이 너무걸리적거렸는데 아주 편합니다

계속 걷다가 탈떄만 슬쩍 가방에 밀어넣고 타니깐 아주좋아요
아직까지는 튿어지거나 그런거 없고 생각보다 짱짱해요

버스 맨날타는데 기사님이 뭐라고 안하세요 ㅎㅎ

다만 검정색이라 퍼그 털 날리는거 잘보이는게 흠이라 그레이 살걸 그랬어여
reviews.content_en:
My 10kg pug is using it and the size is just perfect! Once she got used to it, she even lies down inside ㅎㅎ

I go back and forth for work with her ㅠㅠ and the thick bag was always in the way, but this is so convenient!

I just keep walking and when I need to board transport, I just slip her into the bag—so great
No signs of tearing or anything so far and it's sturdier than I thought!

I take the bus every day and the driver has never said anything ㅎㅎ

But the black color shows my pug's shedding really well, so I wish I'd gotten gray instead

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content: 너무 좋아요 뚜벅이라 버스타고 다닐 일이 많은데 원래 쓰던 가방은 부피도 크고 다 천으로 되어있어사 여름에는 쫌 걱정이 됐는데 얘는 다 망사라 더 편해하고 안더워하는게 느껴져요 접어서 다닐 수도 있고 다들 이게 가방이냐면서 신기해하네요😆 근데 애가 쫌 큰 편이라 9키로인데 가방에 넣는건 괜찮은데 길이가 쫌 짧아서 딱 낑겨있는 느낌? xl까지만 쫌 나왔으면 좋겠어요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I really love it! Since I take public transportation a lot, I was concerned about my old bag being bulky and completely cloth—especially in summer. But since this is all mesh, she seems more comfortable and doesn't get as hot. I can fold it up to carry, and everyone's amazed that this is actually a bag 😆 But since my pup is a bit bigger at 9kg, fitting her in isn't a problem, but the length is a bit short so it feels snug? I wish they made an XL size ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 신****
reviews.content:
일단 저희애는 몸길이 24, 30짜리 두마리고요
24는 M 사고 30은 L 샀는데 길이 낙낙하게 맞고요
높이가 길어서 30에 롱다리인 친구가 서있어도 머리 위에 길이가 좀 남으네요
애들 넣기 편하게 완전히 펼칠 수 있는게 큰 장점인것 같아요
그리고 가벼운것!
가볍다고해서 밑창이 야들하지않고 단단하니 애들 다리에 부담도 안 갈 것 같아요
잘 사용하겠습니다!
reviews.content_en:
I have two dogs with back lengths of 24 and 30, respectively.
I got M for the 24 and L for the 30, and the lengths fit nicely with room to spare.
The height is long enough that even my friend's long-legged 30cm dog standing has some extra length above the head.
The ability to fully open and unfold to easily fit the dogs in is a major advantage I think.
And the lightness!
Just because it's light doesn't mean the bottom is flimsy—it's sturdy so my dogs won't feel pressure on their legs.
I'll use it well!

reviews.name: 정****
reviews.content:
강아지가방이 여러개 있어요 좋다는 브랜드거는 다 있는것 같아요 . 진짜 바잇미게 실용적이예요 일단 휴대하기 너무 좋고 받침이 너무 탄탄해서 아니가 편하게 있어요. 구매한지는 좀 됬는데 가방이 많아 어제 처음으로 사용해봤어요. 버스타면서 태웠는데 아이가 정말 편하게 움직이지도 않고 지퍼를 다 잠궈도 얼굴을 내밀려고 하지도 않고 편하게 타고갔어요.
진짜 강추예요
reviews.content_en:
I have several dog bags—I think I have all the brands that are supposed to be good. BITE ME is seriously practical! First of all, it's so easy to carry, and the support is so sturdy that my dog is comfortable inside. I bought it a while ago but didn't use it until yesterday since I have so many bags. When I took the bus with it, my dog stayed completely still—even with the zipper fully closed, she didn't try to poke her face out and just traveled comfortably.
Seriously, highly recommend it!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
다른 후기들처럼 냄새가 나서 바로 손빨래하고 계속 널어놓고 있어요! 점점 냄새가 빠지는 것 같아요.
처음 알게된 가방인데 파우치로 접었다가 펼치면 큰 가방으로 변신한다는 게 너무 효율적이에요 ㅎㅎ
바닥도 생각보다 단단하고 너무 좋습니다:) 
4.1kg 허리긴 믹스견이 사용하기에 L사이즈가 넉넉하고 좋습니다.
reviews.content_en:
Like other reviews, there's a smell so I hand-washed it right away and have been airing it out! The smell seems to be fading little by little.
First time knowing about this bag, and it's so efficient how it folds up like a pouch and transforms into a large bag when unfolded ㅎㅎ
The bottom is sturdier than expected and just great :)
L size is roomy and perfect for my 4.1kg long-bodied mixed dog.

reviews.name: 유****
reviews.content: 흐물거릴까봐 걱정했는데 바닥이 탄탄해서 M사이즈에 소형견 두마리도 들어가서 잘 있네용. 첨에는 애들이 적응하느라 주춤주춤하는 모습을 보였지만 몇분 지나니 알아서 자리 잡아서 잘 있고 무엇보다 넘 가벼워서 좋아용. 하지만 다리나 허리가 안 좋은 친구들은 옆이 흐물거리기 때문에 어깨에 맬때 팔과 허리쪽에 강아지 몸이 눌릴수는 있으니 참고해주시면 좋을것같아용.
reviews.content_en: I was worried it might be flimsy, but the bottom is sturdy so even two small dogs fit in the M size and stay comfortably. At first the dogs were hesitant getting used to it, but after a few minutes they settled in on their own. Best of all, it's so light! However, friends with leg or back issues should note that since the sides are soft, when carrying over the shoulder, the dog's body might press on your arm and lower back. So just keep that in mind!

reviews.name: L****
reviews.content: 10월 10일 이후 순차발송이라고 해서 14일 여행에 못가지고 갈까봐 걱정했는데 생각보다 일찍 도착했어요. 장바구니처럼 접혀있는 상태는 라지 사이즈다보니 아주 작지는 않아요. 하지만 이렇게 접어지는 이동가방은 없으니까! 에코백 같은 가방 속에 가지고 다니다가 꼭 이동장 안에 넣어야 입장 가능한 곳에서 사용하면 될꺼 같아요. 저희 강아지가 키도 크고 몸도 긴 꽉 찬 7킬로 인데 앉으면 넉넉하게 잘 맞아요.(물론 일어서면 지퍼가 잘 안잠기지만)
reviews.content_en: It said sequential shipment after October 10th, so I was worried I couldn't take it on my October 14th trip, but it arrived earlier than expected. Since it's a large size, when folded up like a shopping basket, it's not super tiny. But there aren't any other travel bags that fold up like this! I can carry it in an eco bag and pull it out when I get to a place that requires it to be in a carrier. My dog is tall and long-bodied, weighing a full 7kg, and when she sits, it fits generously. (Of course, when she stands up, the zipper doesn't close as well.)
